name: source-check-skill
description: Catch fabricated citations and silently stale info from AI agents — multi-criteria scientific verification skills, packaged as Claude Code plugins for Cowork.

plugins.name: source-check
plugins.description: Verify every external claim in your output via multi-criteria scientific verification routed by claim type. Six claim types each route to a type-specific verifier subagent. Verifiers fetch live sources before reading the claim, require verbatim quotes that mechanically substring-match, and at least one tool call to a domain not in the cited URLs.

plugins.name: source-check-max
plugins.description: High-stakes dual-verifier extension to source-check. For each factual citation, spawns TWO independent verifiers — V1 fetches the URL the agent cited; V2 receives only author+year+title and must independently rediscover the source. Catches wrong-URL citations and fabricated papers. Use for legal / medical / financial / regulatory citations. REQUIRES source-check plugin installed alongside.
